title: Bar Staff CV Example UK — Pubs, Bars & Events

cv.name: Chloe Bennett
cv.title: Bar Staff
cv.summary: Enthusiastic bar staff with 3 years in high-volume city-centre pubs. Skilled in cellar care, cocktail basics, till operation, and responsible alcohol service. Personal Licence holder. Available evenings and weekends.

bullets: Served 300+ customers on busy match-day shifts with zero service complaints
Managed cellar rotation and line cleaning — reduced wastage by 12%
Trained 3 new bar staff on tills, age verification, and conflict de-escalation
Worked festival bars serving 500+ drinks per shift with accurate cash handling
Set up and broke down mobile bars to health and safety standards

education.raw:
Personal Licence Holder — 2022
WSET Level 1 Award in Wines — 2023
